# Midlands Made

> Web design service in Mullingar, Co. Westmeath, Ireland. A complete small-business
> website costs EUR 300 once-off — no monthly fees — and is typically live within 3 days.
> Free homepage preview before any payment; the client owns the site, domain and hosting.

## What we do

- Custom websites for local businesses in Mullingar, Westmeath and the Irish Midlands
- Mobile-first design, booking/enquiry forms, Google Search and Google Maps setup
- One flat price: EUR 300 once-off. No subscriptions. Small later updates from EUR 30
- Domain (~EUR 25/year for a .ie) and free hosting registered in the client's own name

## Contact

- Website: https://midlandsmade.ie/
- Phone / WhatsApp: +353 85 116 1036
- Email: midlandsmadeweb@gmail.com
- Based in: Mullingar, Co. Westmeath, Ireland (service area: the Irish Midlands)
